Label: AnatomicalEntity
Description: An anatomical entity from ontology (e.g. UBERON) describing anatomical structures examined in assays

Label: Assay
Description: A unique assay instance representing differential gene expression measurements from Gene Expression Atlas

Label: Association
Description: A general association between entities in the knowledge graph

Label: Attribute
Description: An attribute or characteristic of an entity

Label: BiologicalSex
Description: The biological sex of study subjects

Label: Cell
Description: A cell type from Cell Ontology (CL) examined in assays or studies

Label: Disease
Description: A disease studied in experiments

Label: Gene
Description: A gene with unique identifier (NCBI Gene ID or Ensembl ID)

Label: GeneExpressionMixin
Description: An association representing differential gene expression between an assay and a gene with quantitative properties

Label: LifeStage
Description: The life stage or developmental stage of study subjects

Label: Pathway
Description: A biological pathway

Label: PopulationOfIndividualOrganisms
Description: A population or group of organisms

Label: ProteinDomain
Description: A protein domain

Label: Study
Description: A study from Gene Expression Atlas containing multiple assays

Label: adj_p_value
Description: Multiple testing-corrected p-value assessing the statistical significance of differential gene expression after controlling the false-discovery rate (FDR). Smaller values (e.g. <= 0.05) indicate the observed log2 fold change is unlikely to arise by chance (float)

Label: array_design
Description: Array design identifier for the assay (string)

Label: contrast_id
Description: Unique identifier for the contrast in an association (string)

Label: Direction
Description: The direction of differential expression (e.g., up- or down-regulated).

Label: effect_size
Description: Effect size measure for the association (float)

Label: Enrichment Source
Description: The source ontology or database used for functional enrichment analysis.

Label: experimental_factors
Description: Experimental factors applied in the study (string)

Label: log2fc
Description: Log2-transformed fold change in gene expression between experimental condition and reference baseline. Positive values indicate up-regulation while negative values denote down-regulation (float)

Label: Organism
Description: The organism in which gene expression was measured.

Label: p_value
Description: Unadjusted p-value for statistical significance (float)

Label: project_title
Description: Title of the study/project (string)

Label: pubmed_id
Description: PubMed identifier for associated publication (string)

Label: secondary_accessions
Description: Alternative accession identifiers for the study (string)

Label: source
Description: Data source (Gene Expression Atlas) (string)

Label: submitter_name
Description: Name of study submitter (string)

Label: technology
Description: Platform or technology used for the assay (string)

Label: description
Description: Textual description of an entity (string)

Label: has_attribute
Description: Links a study to its population attribute

Label: has_output
Description: Links a study to its assay outputs

Label: id
Description: Unique identifier for an entity (string)

Label: in_taxon
Description: Links a study to its taxonomic organism

Label: name
Description: Human-readable name for an entity (string)

Label: object
Description: Links GeneExpressionMixin to its object gene

Label: predicate
Description: Defines the relationship type in an association (typically affects_expression_of)

Label: studies
Description: Links a study to disease studied

Label: subject
Description: Links GeneExpressionMixin to its subject assay

Label: symbol
Description: Gene symbol (string)
